label: Kuramoto
description: Kuramoto equations, derivations, and reference topics.

topics.label: Kuramoto model
topics.description: Inspect the canonical Kuramoto evolution equation.

topics.label: Equation 5
topics.description: Inspect the complex order parameter definition.

topics.label: Equation 9
topics.description: Inspect the stationary density split into locked and drifting branches.

topics.label: Equation 10
topics.description: Inspect the self-consistency equation for the order parameter.

topics.label: Equation 11
topics.description: Inspect the reduced locked-oscillator self-consistency equation.

topics.label: Equation 13
topics.description: Inspect the Lorentzian choice for the natural-frequency distribution.

topics.label: Eq. 12 -> Eq. 13
topics.description: Follow the onset condition in Eq. 12 through the Lorentzian specialization that produces Eq. 13.

topics.label: Eq. 13 Addendum: Lorentzian Frequency Distribution
topics.description: Explain why the Lorentzian choice for g of omega is special and how it yields K_c = 2 gamma and an explicit synchronized branch.

topics.label: Eq. 13 -> Eq. 14
topics.description: Show Kuramoto's exact Lorentzian calculation and how it connects to the general near-threshold scaling law.

topics.label: Eq. 5 + Eq. 9 -> Eq. 10
topics.description: Walk through how Eq. 5 and Eq. 9 combine into Eq. 10.

topics.label: Eq. 10 Addendum: Variables
topics.description: Glossary-style addendum for the variables and functions appearing in Eq. 10.

topics.label: Eq. 10 -> Eq. 11
topics.description: Walk through how the locked part of Eq. 10 reduces to Eq. 11.

topics.label: Theta Bounds vs Omega Bounds
topics.description: See why angle bounds only reappear after changing variables from omega to an angle.

topics.label: Identities Cheatsheet
topics.description: Quick reference for derivation identities like the Dirac delta rule, Euler's identity, and odd/even symmetry.

topics.label: Integrand Rewrite Cheatsheet
topics.description: Worked examples of rewriting an integrand into standard forms before integrating.
